overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic dystopian city. The journey begins on a wide palm-lined boulevard, passes the iconic Arasaka corporate tower, continues through industrial backstreets with graffiti-covered walls, and ends in an area with traditional Japanese-inspired architecture. The atmosphere is hazy with warm, dusty lighting and strong shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide city boulevard with palm trees and street furniture

events.description: passing by pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide sidewalk, passing benches and newspaper racks

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the center median of the boulevard
low-rise industrial complex with flat roof and steam vents
white concrete benches and rectangular planters
newspaper and magazine display rack on the sidewalk
tall modern street lights with horizontal orange accent bars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, sunlit city boulevard lined with tall palm trees. The player walks along a concrete sidewalk past benches and street furniture, with a low industrial building visible across the street. The atmosphere is hazy and warm, with sparse pedestrian traffic and occasional vehicles passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with corporate tower view

events.description: approaching intersection with dramatic view of Arasaka tower
turning right to cross the street toward the industrial district

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while looking up at the towering Arasaka building, then turning right

notable_agents.action: tan sedan parked at the curb near the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive black corporate skyscraper with illuminated vertical Arasaka signage
traffic signal pole with orange accents and crosswalk signals

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a major intersection where the massive Arasaka tower dominates the left side of the frame, its black facade and white signage standing out against the hazy sky. After crossing the street with other pedestrians, the player turns right, leaving the main boulevard behind.

events.description: turning right into narrower street with industrial buildings and vending machines

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the industrial street, passing a person at a vending machine

notable_agents.action: person in red outfit standing at vending machine on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall yellow and black automated vending machine against the wall
plain concrete industrial building wall with small windows
large metal utility pole with electrical transformers and cables

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a narrower industrial street, walking alongside a concrete wall with a vending machine. The area feels more enclosed with utility poles and power lines visible. A lone NPC stands at the vending machine as the player passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: entering narrow alley with extensive graffiti on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway, passing graffiti-covered walls and industrial infrastructure

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large metal electrical transmission tower with multiple cable lines
metal security fence with barbed wire on top

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow back alley with a graffiti-covered wall on the right. The space feels more enclosed with chain-link fencing on the left and large power pylons visible ahead. The lighting becomes more diffused as the player moves through the shadow of the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with traditional architecture and digital billboards

events.description: exiting narrow alley into open area with traditional Japanese-style buildings
cream-colored van passes by on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the open street, passing by traditional architecture and street vendors

notable_agents.action: person in tactical gear walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: low-rise buildings with red tiled roofs and traditional wooden facades
large curved digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
covered walkway with metal roof structure and graffiti on the wall
tall signpost with multiple directional signs and lights
palm trees visible in the distance along the street

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow alley into a more open area featuring traditional Japanese-inspired architecture with red roofs on the left. Digital billboards and covered market structures line the street, while palm trees are visible in the distance. The atmosphere opens up again with full sky visibility and direct sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, sunlit boulevard into the claustrophobic depths of industrial backstreets before emerging into a traditional architectural district. It begins on a hazy, palm-lined sidewalk with sparse traffic, moving steadily toward a major intersection dominated by the massive, black facade of the Arasaka tower. As the camera turns away from the main road, the environment shifts into a narrower industrial street characterized by concrete walls, utility poles, and a lone figure at a vending machine. The scene then tightens further into a shadowed back alley enclosed by chain-link fencing and graffiti-covered walls, where the lighting becomes diffused beneath towering power pylons. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into an open plaza featuring red-roofed Japanese-inspired buildings and digital billboards under a clear, sunlit sky.
